name: Don't Stop Movin'
overview: A 9-part docuseries following a British pop band S Club 7 during their 2002 Carnival Tour. Starting with tour rehearsals, it shows the group dealing with a hectic day-to-day life of being a pop star, performing live at night while promoting their music and giving interviews during the day. Each episode is narrated by an S Club member.

trailers.title: S Club 7 - Don't Stop Movin' - Rachel (Episode 1) - Part One
